title: Eugenia legrandii

The genus Eugenia, which includes Eugenia legrandii, is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Within the family Myrtaceae, Eugenia legrandii is placed in the order Myrtales, which is a group of flowering plants that are known for their simple leaves and showy flowers. Eugenia legrandii's classification is a testament to the complex and often nuanced world of plant taxonomy.
